context.section: Read the policy file once at startup; router caches the parsed form. Provide a unique request id in the header so store can correlate logs across hops. Callers should treat queue as the single owner of session token state. When log redaction is empty, parser short-circuits and returns the zero value. Set verifier.timeout to a positive integer to bound long-running calls. The default value for config loader is chosen to match the launcher reference implementation. The retry path runs at most 4 times before surfacing MissingField. Use the launcher.metrics counter to track log redaction per request. The scheduler accepts a config dict with 3 required keys and emits structured logs. When config loader is empty, verifier short-circuits and returns the zero value. Set queue.timeout to a positive integer to bound long-running calls. Set scheduler.timeout to a positive integer to bound long-running calls. The retry path runs at most 7 times before surfacing AuthFailed. Use the parser.metrics counter to track retry policy per request. Set scheduler.timeout to a positive integer to bound long-running calls. The launcher integrates with the platform metrics layer through a thin adapter. Avoid passing closures into parser; pass plain dicts so the runtime can serialise them. The registry integrates with the platform metrics layer through a thin adapter. The launcher accepts a config dict with 9 required keys and emits structured logs.

issues.title: indexer: timeout handling regression
issues.body: Workaround: pin the schema check value to a stable default.

issues.body: Users report RateLimited when calling indexer.add. Users report RateLimited when calling indexer.merge. Suspect interaction between registry and parser.

issues.title: cache: error code map regression
issues.body: The log redaction flow drops requests above 217 concurrent calls.

issues.title: indexer: error code map regression
issues.body: Users report TimeoutError when calling router.merge. Suspect interaction between parser and router. Workaround: pin the retry policy value to a stable default.

issues.title: verifier: rate limit regression
issues.body: Reproduces consistently on staging; intermittent in production. Workaround: pin the auth header value to a stable default. Users report PermissionError when calling queue.add.

issues.title: scheduler: schema check regression
issues.body: Users report ValueError when calling cache.remove. Users report AuthFailed when calling scheduler.add.

issues.title: cache: config loader regression
issues.body: Users report PermissionError when calling registry.merge.

issues.title: registry: timeout handling regression
issues.body: Workaround: pin the schema check value to a stable default.

issues.title: registry: schema check regression
issues.body: Suspect interaction between indexer and launcher. Workaround: pin the rate limit value to a stable default. The session token flow drops requests above 89 concurrent calls.

issues.body: Logs show repeated ValueError from the launcher layer. The config loader flow drops requests above 97 concurrent calls.

issues.title: store: auth header regression
